text.title: RAG Policy Thresholds Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: scaffold → set thresholds → publish → run weekly compute-colour → quarterly review.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.input: Incident corpus + signal definitions + cohort baseline
step.action: Run `set-thresholds`. Per signal pick numeric `amber_threshold` + `red_threshold` + `comparator` + ≥ 1 evidence anchor. Reject "significant"/"material" inputs.

step.name: publish
step.action: Run validator. Commit to repo. Notify stakeholders with the version + last_reviewed.

step.name: run-weekly-compute
step.action: Run `compute-colour` at every reporting cadence. Apply comparator to thresholds. Emit colour + cite policy_version.
step.decision-gate: If colour == Red, fire `actions.red` immediately; do not wait for next sync.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.input: Last quarter colour history + outcome data
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. Remove unused thresholds, add new ones tied to recent incidents. Increment version, update `last_reviewed`.
